name: ololand-forensic-qoe
description: Forensic Quality-of-Earnings primitives as a standalone Claude plugin: Beneish M-Score, Benford's Law, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection, working-capital deep dive, and covenant-cascade analysis (cross-default chain modeling). Wraps OloLand's deterministic forensic engines as the Pre-LOI Forensic Screen wedge ($7,500 / 72 hours, IC-defensible). Sells against Big-4 QoE ($150-500K, 4-8 weeks).

interface.shortDescription: Forensic quality-of-earnings primitives for Pre-LOI screening.
interface.longDescription: Forensic Quality-of-Earnings primitives as a standalone Claude plugin: Beneish M-Score, Benford's Law, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection, working-capital deep dive, and covenant-cascade analysis (cross-default chain modeling). Wraps OloLand's deterministic forensic engines as the Pre-LOI Forensic Screen wedge ($7,500 / 72 hours, IC-defensible). Sells against Big-4 QoE ($150-500K, 4-8 weeks).
